title: EMT/Paramedic

rationales.taskAutomation: Patient assessment, treatment and transport in the field are physical, licensed acts; only dispatch routing and post-call documentation carry a digital share.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted dispatch triage and route optimization tools exist but are not yet standard across most EMS agencies.
rationales.adoption: Larger urban EMS systems are piloting AI dispatch triage; most agencies still rely on traditional protocols.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can optimize dispatch routing and pre-fill run reports, but on-scene assessment and treatment stay entirely human.

tasksGrowing: Crisis communication with patients and families
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-2042 (Emergency Medical Technicians), p25-p75 rounded
insight: Emergency response is in-person, time-critical physical work that AI can support at the margins, dispatch routing, report drafting, but not perform. Paramedic-level certification keeps opening more career ceiling than AI closes.
